summary:
HISTORICAL RACIAL INJUSTICE AND DIVINE RESTITUTION: Brandon shares a profound spiritual experience concerning the historical suffering of African Americans and Native Americans. Prompted by his wife Diana, who has Apache heritage and reflects on the Trail of Tears, Brandon describes visions of the Tulsa race riots of 1921 and the destruction of Black Wall Street. He recounts seeing Harriet Tubman leading slaves via the Underground Railroad, navigating by the North Star, and hearing the deep, heavy spiritual songs of enslaved people. He also mentions seeing Abraham Lincoln and his role in emancipation. Brandon conveys a divine message that God has not forgotten these historical pains and promises a massive restitution with interest, equating to four hundred years of generational back pay.

MINISTRY ETHOS AND FREE RESOURCE DISTRIBUTION: Brandon reflects on his personal background and ministry philosophy, recalling his past financial struggles when trying to purchase Christian cassette tapes and materials. Because of these experiences, he strongly opposes charging money for ministry resources. Despite suggestions to write books or sell ministry merchandise like t-shirts, Brandon emphasizes his commitment to giving everything away for free, rooted in his humble beginnings as a janitor and his desire to make spiritual teachings accessible to everyone without financial burden.

GEOPOLITICAL PROPHECIES AND GLOBAL CONFLICT: Brandon details several prophetic visions regarding international conflicts and economic shifts. He describes an upcoming war involving Israel and Iran, where an American missile strikes an Iranian underground city, severely crippling Iran's capabilities and pushing them back to the Stone Age. He foresees strikes on oil refineries that will cause gas prices to skyrocket to two hundred dollars a barrel, reminiscent of the 1970s gas crisis. Additionally, he mentions increased drilling in the Mediterranean and the Gulf of Mexico, negotiations involving the Nord Stream pipeline, and a rise in global antisemitism with nations like Russia, Syria, and Turkey seeking retaliation. Brandon also briefly mentions President Trump seeking a diplomatic approach and the creation of a black swan event to justify military reactions.

COMMUNION AND SPIRITUAL INTIMACY: Brandon emphasizes the profound holiness of taking communion, warning against letting the practice become a meaningless religious ritual. He stresses that communion is a deeply relational act that honors the sacrifice of Jesus Christ. During this time, he intercedes for various ethnic groups worldwide, particularly mentioning the Jewish people and the horrors of the Holocaust, applying the spiritual cleansing of communion to heal generational and historical traumas across all tribes and nations.

INTERNATIONAL REVIVAL AND IMPENDING NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon shares specific visions concerning global regions and natural phenomena. He prays against a communist takeover and election fraud in South Korea, declaring a border of protection and prophesying a great revival starting there and in Japan. He foresees a Chinese naval blockade around Taiwan. Domestically, he describes a Jewish wedding chuppah made of olive wood positioned on the Oklahoma-Texas border, symbolizing a massive upcoming spiritual revival and the imminent return of Christ. Conversely, he warns of catastrophic natural disasters, including massive volcanic eruptions in Hawaii, Alaska, and Japan, severe shifting along the Ring of Fire, and a devastating tsunami striking the Space Needle in Seattle.

ECONOMIC SHAKING AND URGENT CALL FOR REPENTANCE: Brandon warns of a dramatic financial collapse, illustrated by a vision of hundred-dollar bills falling from a massive oak tree and transforming into digital currency before hitting the ground. He stresses that humanity is currently in a brief window of grace extended through intercessory prayer, urging people not to squander this time. He concludes with a fervent call for immediate repentance and spiritual preparation, warning that everything known to humanity is about to change permanently and that people must align themselves vertically with God to endure the coming global shakings.
rawData: [June 02, 2025]-[Words can't describe what happened today in prayer]-[https://youtu.be/r-6QgcJFlPM]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me today. Well, glory to God. I wasn't going to do a video today, but there's things on my heart that I would like to talk about. Diana is behind the camera. Hi. And she said, "Honey, after you did that video last night and the anointing was so strong in the house and we were interceding," she says, "it's been on my heart all day long." You know, she's Apache and about the Trail of Tears and all of it, you know, about her ancestors and the Trail of Tears and the Native Americans and the suffering that they went through, you know, and all the different things, the hardship of people. But she said, "I feel in my spirit there's something more to what you saw about the African-American population last night, Brandon, and I don't know what it is, but I'm going to start searching. I want to study because I feel the spirit of the Lord has told me there's more." And so, she was sitting on the couch and she started just, you know, my wife's very intelligent and she's over there tapping away and she goes, "Oh, I found it." She came to me and she was crying, and she said, "Brandon, I found it." She said, "Everything the Lord," she goes, "the Lord is so strategic in timing." She goes, "Brandon, we live in Tulsa." And she said, "I just found the Tulsa race riots started on May 31st of 1921, and they went until June 1st." And she said 30 blocks of homes were burned from African-American men and women, businesses, everything. And they called it Black Wall Street. It was a wealthier part of one of the wealthiest black suburbs in America at the time. And there were 800 people that were hurt. Several—I think it was like 30, 40 people—lost their lives. 36 total: 26 African-Americans and 10 white. Yep. A very tragic thing. And I just, wow, what was on, you know, when I come, you know, I let you in on something that's so private to Diana and me, our prayer time. You don't allow—it's very, for me, it's taken a learning curve for me to let people in because this is my walk that I've had since I've been 16. It's something I've developed. And when you sit at the Father's feet, He shows you what's on His heart. He shows you what's on His heart. He shows you what He's compassionate about—things that you think have been forgotten. Things like—I saw whenever I was in the spirit, I saw a rug, a big-looking rug, a throw rug, and it was being lifted up and it was used like a dustpan, and people wanted to brush all the dirt underneath it. And He said, "I'm going to take that rug up and I'm exposing the darkness, and I'm exposing the dirt underneath that rug." Brandon, the hurt, the pain is real and it still exists in a lot of people. And I'm ready to heal it. I'm ready to set these people free. But not only that, I saw Harriet Tubman, the African-American woman with the purple durag, and it was amazing, folks, is that I saw pictures of her—my son Googled her and we started looking—with purple durags just like I saw, with the white shirt, when she was doing the Underground Railroad. But they called it Black Wall Street. And if you remember last night, I kept seeing Wall Street, Wall Street, and I saw New York City. And that was how the Lord was describing to me—not about New York City, it was a type and shadow of something that He was, because I'm seeing New York being painted in front of my face. But He doesn't tell me "Tulsa Wall Street" because I wouldn't have understood. He was talking to me directly about Wall Street in New York, and it was a type and shadow of what was going on with the race riots in Tulsa, Oklahoma. And my mind was—I'm humbled that He would want to take a bald-headed white guy, come on YouTube, and want me to pray for something so precious to Him. I don't know why me, all these people. God, what He allowed me to see last night, none of you can understand it. Even the African-American people that are here right now have a glimpse of what you've heard. But I went into the depth of the heart of it in the spirit, and I could feel it in intercession. Those people in chains and the pain they felt, so much God would give me glimpses of their heart. And words can't explain to you the bondage and the hopelessness that they felt, similar to, I'm sure, what the children of Israel felt for 400 years. But people, you can read a story, you can read a novel, you can read history books. That's what I'm trying to say. You can read history books, and you can hear about this woman with the purple rag, and we all think she's great, or Rosa Parks sitting in the back of the bus. These people, we hear about them, and maybe somebody might have known them, but a story is nothing until you feel it. That's what I'm trying to tell you. The Trail of Tears, I was there in the spirit realm. I could see the children. I could see these people walking in the snow. I could see they were barefoot and their feet were blistering with frostbite walking across the land. And I could see them, and they were so—they were tied up and they were going across the land, getting taken out of their area where they lived to be taken to Oklahoma, to these places, forced to leave, forced to do these things. It's pain beyond anybody's comprehension, if it was mine. And I'm not going to say here, "Well, I can relate, I can do all this." No, no, no. I saw a glimpse. It's like opening up a book and you see it, and you open it up, you get a glimpse of something. But it's that way in the spirit. I got a glimpse of something, something that was very hurtful. And me as a white guy, I, like I said, I don't know why He chose me, but I am humbled, and I know what the Lord said. He said, "I've not forgotten your prayers," and I've heard that echo inside of my spirit. And I could see the prayers coming up from those African slaves in those camps with these wood huts, and they had little fires, and they were looking at the stars and they were looking at the North. And it was interesting because that Tubman lady, it was about the North Star. I could see the North Star. I could see the Big Dipper. I could see they were navigating by stars at night to get through because they didn't travel in the day. So, they were trying to get through in the nighttime and they were using the stars as a map so they wouldn't get lost. And that's what I was seeing in the spirit. But they were looking for the North Star. And I thought that was really interesting because that's how detailed these visions were last night. I could see them, and they had little bitty fire torches, and they were trying to move through areas, and I was like, "What in the world, Lord?" And as I'm looking and able to look over there, I see them praying and singing old songs. And there were old—not Pentecostal songs, but old Bible songs like hymnals, old hymns, old songs that we don't sing anymore. I was trying to listen because I was hearing, and this is what's amazing: I've never been in a vision and heard people singing before. I could hear the African-American people singing, the women and the men, and it was a deep, heavy song. It wasn't joyful. It was heavy, like groanings in the spirit. It was heavy, asking the Father for freedom. "Where are you? Why have you forgotten us? Why are we going through this?" crying out for the Father to redeem them and set them free. And as I saw them praying, I saw a man named Abraham Lincoln. And God raised up a man named Abraham Lincoln to do what he did to bring freedom to the slaves. And I saw them murder him. I saw all this stuff panned out, and he was a really tall man, and some people say, "Well, he was 6'4"," but with his top hat—I saw his hat, and it made him look like he was a lot bigger. I'm telling you in the vision—and this is another thing—was everybody else a lot smaller? Because he looked like he was head and shoulders above everybody, from these men that were below him. So I'm like, well, maybe people weren't very tall back then. I don't know, because when I saw him, he was like a really big guy in this black suit in the vision, and I'm still trying to figure out what I saw. I'm like, was he standing next to kids? I don't know. All I know is I tell you these things, but I saw he was a lot bigger of a man than everybody else was. So maybe everybody else is like 5'5" or something. I don't know. They didn't look like they were very big people. Does it matter? No. I just try to figure it out. I love when the Lord shows me things, and I take it very seriously. It's His love language towards me. It's intimacy. It's how I learn how to communicate with Him. And He shows me things. And it's something that I never thought I would ever go public about to the point like I am now, that 70,000 people would look at it a day. But I know a lot of you are just desperate and want intimacy with Him. That's why you're here. You want your own relationship. And the Lord wants you to have it. He's no respecter of persons, but He is a respecter of those that seek Him. And I want to tell you, as you seek Him, you'll find Him. But when He told me He was going to bring a restitution—restitution, but with interest. With interest. And people say, 'Well, how's that going to happen?' I don't know. It's in the spirit. And if God said He would reward those and bring that to them, you can take it to the bank. My Father is able. I'm not going to question the God of the universe, the God of everything, and go, 'Well, how are you going to do that with my peanut brain?' when He can make manna out of nothing, turn the water into wine, do all the things that He's always done, and do super exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. If He said He would do it, He's able, and I don't question it. I just go, He told me to tell you for you to believe for it. And those of you that are in the young generation, if those others have gone home—your elders have gone home, because I saw 80 years old, 90 years old, and I didn't know why I was seeing that. But if you were a child in the 1921 race riots, you'd still be here probably, right? That's only 104 years ago. Yeah. So if you were a child, you're still here probably, right? No, well, no, to be born, they'd probably be dead. Yeah, if possible. I mean, they're like 106, 107. It's very, very unlikely. Pretty rare. Very unlikely. So, it's their grandchildren. Yeah. It would be their grandchild or their children. Their children would probably still be here. They were raised still up underneath that. They're old, though. That would be the 80 and 90 years old probably that I was seeing in the spirit realm. The Lord was showing me that He was still bringing restitution for them. Right. So, wow. It's just time goes. But after I see what the Lord is showing me, for you to believe just like it was for Diana to believe for her ancestors—ancestors, they didn't get the restitution. You know, they get Indian land, tribal benefits, and things like that. And but the Lord was showing me making the wrong right, making the wrong right, that He had not forgotten it. And it's not brushed underneath the rug. It's time to take the rug off. And the white folks, I realize there's a lot more ignorant people than what you think. It's like Diana, and I told her we got some dumb emails, but you know what, people are... it's the devil behind them. They don't understand. They're blinded by their own religious Pharisee, racist, bigoted ways. And that's what it is. I use these hard words, but my goodness, folks, we have some really ignorant people. And you go, 'Okay, I'm not inciting any kind of violence. I'm not inciting people to get upset.' I'm trying to tell you the Father wants to restore you. The Father wants to restore you. And that's all it's about with me. I'm obedient unto Him unto death. And when He says speak, I speak. And this is what the Spirit of the Lord wanted to say to you yesterday: that He loves you, and He's not forgotten you. And the pain of the past, He's going to give you back more than what you ever... it's more than sevenfold. He said, 'I'm going to restore back all the money.' So 400 years of wealth, if you'll believe for it. 400 years of family bloodline back pay with interest. And I was like, that's millions of dollars in my opinion. I mean, so believe God for big. Believe God for big. Why not? If He said He would do it, believe for it. And so that was what I had for you today of that, just rehearsing things. Now, side note, that was precious in itself, but the things I'm seeing about Israel and the baby wrapped in the blanket with Israel, I don't understand all that. A rebirthing, new things are going to take place. So, what a patriotism. There's something about patriotism from June, this next month today, going all the way into July—of patriotism. There's something, and people say, 'You say what's going to happen in 24 hours.' Everything will change within a 24-hour period whenever you'll see it. I don't know. That's just... I just hear this, and I am like an antenna. I have my little antenna up and you're picking up from the receiver. I have my receiver, and I have the main broadcast going on, and my little antenna is going beep-beep like my little radio, and I'm picking up my radio, my Bible. And I got this, and it's downloaded into me that God says that everything you know is going to change within a 24-hour period. And I hear that and I go, I'm relaying it back as, 'This is what the Spirit of the Lord tells me to tell you.' And everything's going to change within a 24-hour period. Everything you know—a great shaking to awaken is coming. A great shaking to awaken is coming. I saw a great war breaking out with Israel and Iran in the days ahead. And I told you back in January that I saw an American missile striking a mountain that was an underground city, and Iran set all kinds of deterrents trying to stop this missile. It was a very powerful one. But when Israel does this, I saw that they set Iran back financially, globally, nuclearly, everything. They put them back in the Stone Age. I heard the Spirit of the Lord say, 'They put them back in the Stone Age.' But when they do this, they strike their oil and their gasoline plants, their petroleum plants, right? I saw like gas, I saw, you know, these refineries. Thank you, Holy Spirit. I'm trying, y'all, because, I'm telling you, these names and these big names, I don't use them. Refineries. I saw refineries. And when they strike the refineries, I saw gas and oil prices skyrocketing. I've warned you of this since 2023, about this for a season, for a season. And then the Lord showed me in that vision the 1970 gas wars. I saw cars lined up down the blocks because of gas shortages. Now, if that still happens, I don't know, but this is what I saw. This is in 2023. And the Lord told me at this time that gas would skyrocket, and it would bring the price of oil up really high, really high. I saw it going up to $200 a barrel, like big money trying to flow, which would stimulate the American economy. It stimulated the American economy whenever these big oil productions get hit in the Middle East. And it would happen for a season, for a window. I don't know how long, for a window. And I saw gas in the Mediterranean being drilled. I saw the Gulf of—people want to argue America—Gulf of Mexico. I don't care. Call it what you want. They were drilling, drilling, drilling, drilling. And I saw, "drill, baby, drill." I saw pipelines being opened up, being worked out, making big agreements for pipelines. The Nord Stream pipeline, I believe, is what it's called. It was the big pipeline. I saw it being talked about and opened up, working on it, just trying to get this pipe deal going, doing major oil big deals ahead, stimulating America's economy. But when this happens, I saw great antisemitism because of people being mad at Israel about what they're about to do. Remember this. I saw them wanting to retaliate with war: Russia, Syria, Turkey. I saw them getting upset, and the Middle East, against, "Well, you did all that. We're going to come after you." So, will we see all this in the days ahead? I don't know, folks. All I know is these are visions that I've seen. Have we changed it through prayer? I don't believe we have. We hear some of this on the news now. Some of the things that I see take years to come to pass. Sometimes it takes 10 years, you know, I don't know. Sometimes it's months. So, let's pray for President Trump. Remember I told you I kept hearing him say, "I want to go about this..." I told you in January, I said he said, "I want to go about this diplomatically. I'm not pushing the button. I'm not pushing the button, but Israel did it anyway." Remember? But then I've been praying and I've told you all I see a black swan event. We got to create a boogeyman. I hear him say we have to create an enemy so that it justifies our reaction. We're going to have to retaliate and make... We have a ripe cause. Like, you know they're bad. We have to stop these bad people, right? But all of it was about nuclear power, about oil, about a lot of things. So, just what I've seen, you take it for what it's worth. I mean, it's a lot to us, right? Yes. And we pray over it and I take everything the Lord shows me to prayer every single time, and I intercede over it, and this is my job. You're just a part of it now. It's very public, but it's what we do. I've been doing it, like I said, for a long time. My whole marriage. Yes, for sure. This is what we do, and we take notes and we write down what the Lord tells us. And that's why it's become so big. It wasn't like this at first. It's taken development, and he would show me glimpses of things. And as I've been faithful with little, he gives me more and more and more. And now it's really cool because whenever I get close to... Like, if we're believing for something and Diana says, "I need you to pray for me. I'm overcoming a headache or something," you know, I don't know, I just give her an instance. I can touch her now, or she can, or I can my kids, and the Lord will show me exactly what's going on and how to fix it, what to pray, everything. And that's part of the healing part. And it's developing and developing and developing. And it's very interesting. But I just told you something I don't ever talk about, but it's very interesting. Amazing. The root cause, everything, where it stems from, how it got there, things like that, with people. And it's all glory to God, folks, because I am nothing without him. It's all about Jesus and what he's done, and he gives us gifts to walk in. I'm nothing special. I'm just Brandon. I'm just grateful that everybody would want to show up every single day and want to pray with me. Thank you. And there are some people so kind. It's like one dear sister, "Hey, if everybody gives them a dollar, if everybody gives them a dollar, you can stop eBay and Poshmark." And I told Diana, I said, "Our people are kind, such good hearts." We thought about doing a book thing. Diana and I pray about doing books; we pray about doing all these things. But she said, even in the car, she said, "Brandon, even if I did a book deal, I could write a book, Brandon, but we are such givers that even if we did it, most people... You see these big ministries, everybody writes a book about every year, and they sell them for $25 a piece. And if they sell 100,000 copies of those, that's a lot of money. You know, they're making millions." And so our heart is, immediately, we just want to give everything away. And so she's like, "Even if I wrote the book, we would put all our finances into making a book and we would give it all away, Brandon," she goes, "because it would be hard. It would bother me to sell a book for 25 bucks, unless the Lord told us to do it to fund our ministry." But my heart is to give, because freely I have received, freely I give. I just... Books, tapes, CDs. I would wait for days, weeks, save up my money to be able to buy a tape series whenever a special guest speaker came to church. And I would go, "Oh, Diana, can we use our tithes to buy those this month?" Because that was our treat. That was our treat. And Diana goes, "Just think of if they were all free, how much further along we'd be." Because we had to wait for weeks to get it. And when the next guest speaker came, we didn't have money to buy it, so we had to wait. And so we were always trying to put money back to buy these tape series or CD series or MP4s or whatever. And it was always like, oh. She goes, "Which one can we have today?" And I'm like, "Well, we get one. We can have one. It's $35." And she goes, "Oh, okay. I see five I really want." That's the way we work. We're always so hungry. Thank God for YouTube now because we can find a lot of those on there. We just push the button, it's there. But back in the early 2000s and when we were kids, it was all like $5 a cassette tape, you know, five bucks. And then when it was $5 a cassette tape times... It was a four-cassette tape series. If the series went on long, the more, the bigger, the more tapes there were, it'd be up to 100 bucks. And we were like, "Oh my God, it's so much money." And we were so excited to get it if we put our money back. So I always tell her, I said, "Can we take our tithe and do it?" You know, because I'm so hungry. But even doing stuff like that now, I go, "Diana, could you even imagine?" I mean, because I feel guilty. I wouldn't be able to do it. I just give it all away. I remember those days. To give a book away, you know, hungry. Golly, I'm crying too much today. I got to cry again. Most people went to movies, but we just saved all our money to buy tapes and books. It's the way it's always been, though. You just want change so bad in your life, and you know that the word would change you if you can get it in you. And there are so many ministers that charge for that stuff, and I'm not condemning it. I know it costs money to get it out. I get it. But in my heart, you'd go bankrupt because I'd give everything I have, these books, all this stuff. And I see all these big ministers make books all the time. They've got brand new books. "I've got a brand new book, $35, 25 bucks." And I'm like, "Oh, yeah, and now I could buy it." But it's not the point. There's a lot of you that couldn't. And I remember the day that I couldn't. And that's why it's like, "Do you want to write a book?" People ask me, "Brandon, write a book." People come to me all the time: "Write a book." And I'm like, even if I did, a book deal wouldn't do you any good. It bothers me to want to charge for it. Maybe I shouldn't be that way. Maybe it should be that I charge for it for the ministry and grow it that way, and, say you sell 100,000 books at $25 a piece, you fund your ministry, and maybe that's how it works. I don't know. I'm new to all this, y'all. I'm new to all of it. But I'm hungry and I want more, and I seek the Lord. But then there are people who say, "You know, we had that t-shirt thing on there," and I thought, "Well, everybody likes a t-shirt for 25 bucks, you know? They want to support us, you know, whatever." And I had it on there, and I took it down because they were too slow and I didn't have anybody to make good t-shirts. But I thought, "Well, everybody has to wear clothes. Clothes are not free, but if they put a design on them, they want to wear a t-shirt to church, you know?" So, I thought that's kind of neat. But then the company said, "You should be charging this," but I charged a lot less than what it was because I wanted people to have it for a good deal. And I told them, I said, "I feel bad charging high-dollar prices, four times what it's worth. You know, people work hard for what they have." When you make what I made being a janitor for so long—you clean all that nasty stuff, all those toilets, and you do that for so long, and clean out the brownie bags, clean out the feminine cans, and do all the things that I did by the thousands—you just respect people more. And I don't cry about this. There's just a lot I'm dealing with. But it is just interesting because of what the Lord is just talking to me. He's just dealing with me a lot. So, I appreciate all of you. I appreciate you coming. I appreciate Diana. We love this prayer time with you, that we could just teach even just one of you how to touch the hem of His garment with what we've done, and that the intimacy of our relationship would become real to you. Maybe it would inspire you. You know, this is my book, so that you could be inspired. I think I was just so touched that the Father would want me to pray for the African-American people the way He did last night and have it be on me so heavy today with the anointing. What an honor! I thought, "What an honor to touch a great group of people and be able to be a part of their journey, and just pray for them like I did." I got to just for that 24 hours, and it's like today it was still so heavy on me, and I thought, "Who am I, Lord, that the God of the universe, the 'I AM THAT I AM,' would come and visit me and say, 'Hey, I have an assignment for you. You live in Tulsa.'?" He could have used anybody. There are so many amazing ministers around here. He could have used anybody, but I do this in my little room in my house with a green screen, and I just come on here and tell you about Jesus. So, let's pray today. I pray this video blessed you and what we said. I just thought it was cool just to talk about some things and just be more real, you know. So, all right. Well, let's pray today. All right. Let's see if the Lord shows us anything else new today. It's His time. All right. I'm going to take communion. I'll take it with you. I don't want this to become, you know, whenever you desensitize it when you do something so robotically that it loses meaning. That's why I skipped it yesterday. The Lord said to me, He goes, "Don't let this become robotic, taking a wafer, taking the juice, and not going deep inside your heart of what it truly means. Don't let it become a religious ritual." A ritual. Thank you. A ritual that you do that is just like putting on your shoes or your clothes, right? This is holy. This is holy. This deserves great respect. This is something that cost somebody everything—our Lord and Savior. Do you understand? This cost Him everything. He paid the price for everything, and this is what it represents. This isn't something that you do like putting on your clothes or taking a bath. This is holy. And whenever the Holy Spirit tells me, He says, "Brandon, you're not being respectful enough with it in your heart. Be reverent. Reverence. Pause. It's holy. It's holy. It's holy." So, we go to Him with holy communion. We go to Him because His blood is enough for you and me. We go to Him because He is worthy of our praise. He is—this is beautiful. This is relationship. This is not religion. This is not Catholic. This is not Protestant. This is relationship. Do you understand? To me, it is. It may be something else to you because of the way you were raised, but this is something that has become so holy to me, precious. This is my key and my ticket. I sit at His feet. You want to know a relationship? This is what based it: communion. It's why I'm so big on it, because it was something that came out of hard times. This came out of hell, going through it, going to Him and saying, "Father, I need You. I need more of You." And that's why I look at it probably so much more differently than everybody else.
